full_text:
Ding Lan (Xiaolian) 丁覽 (孝連)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Lan (丁覽), styledXiaolian (孝連), was born in Kuaji. An orphan, he was an honourable and generous man but died before he could rise further. Ding Lan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
